# AI Discovery Prompt Library

## 1) Source-mapped synthesis prompt
Use when summarizing interview notes.

Prompt requirements:
- cite source note id for every theme
- separate confirmed findings from hypotheses
- include outlier signals

## 2) Adversarial persona generation prompt
Use when generating edge-case user profiles.

Prompt requirements:
- ban stereotype language
- force evidence-grounded constraints
- include abuse/misuse behavior scenarios

## 3) Wizard-of-Oz pilot prompt
Use when planning human-assisted simulation.

Prompt requirements:
- include disclosure text
- include consent checkpoint
- define stop conditions and escalation path

## 4) Bias and failure check prompt
Use before finalizing insights.

Prompt requirements:
- list likely bias traps
- flag low-confidence findings
- recommend additional interviews needed
